title: Add Diner Hell and Toxic Trails Science haunted houses with sub-scene and generated logos

requirements.summary: Add "Diner Hell" haunted house entry with English scary tagline/description and a "Kitchen Nightmares" sub-scene stored in the haunted house catalog.
acceptanceCriteria: "Diner Hell" appears in the haunted houses list rendered by the existing HauntedHousesSection.
The Diner Hell entry includes a non-empty tagline and description in English.
The Diner Hell entry includes a sub-scene list containing an entry titled "Kitchen Nightmares".

file_operations.description: Add a new haunted house object for "Diner Hell" with an English scary tagline and description, and include a non-empty subScenes array containing a sub-scene entry titled "Kitchen Nightmares" (stored directly in the catalog data).

requirements.summary: Add "Toxic Trails Science" haunted house entry with English scary tagline and description in the haunted house catalog.
acceptanceCriteria: "Toxic Trails Science" appears in the haunted houses list rendered by the existing HauntedHousesSection.
The Toxic Trails Science entry includes a non-empty tagline and description in English.

file_operations.description: Add a new haunted house object for "Toxic Trails Science" with an English scary tagline and description, matching the existing catalog structure so it renders in HauntedHousesSection.

requirements.summary: Wire generated logo images for the new haunted houses by adding mappings and static assets so the haunted house grid renders non-broken images.
acceptanceCriteria: generatedImages.hauntedHouses contains entries for "Diner Hell" and "Toxic Trails Science".
The haunted houses grid displays images (non-broken sources) for both new haunted houses.

file_operations.description: Add generatedImages.hauntedHouses mappings for keys "Diner Hell" and "Toxic Trails Science" pointing to their corresponding static assets so HauntedHousesSection resolves imagePath correctly.

Add the generated static image asset for the "Diner Hell" haunted house logo (rusted, bloody diner sign with broken/flickering lights) at frontend/public/assets/generated/house-diner-hell-logo.dim_1400x900.jpg.

Add the generated static image asset for the "Toxic Trails Science" haunted house logo (vivid toxic green palette with blood splatter and corrupted science/hazard vibe) at frontend/public/assets/generated/house-toxic-trails-science-logo.dim_1400x900.jpg.
